examples.name: Four-member stack with Active, Standby, and Member roles
examples.input:
Switch/Stack Mac Address : cc98.9114.3580 - Local Mac Address
Mac persistency wait time: Indefinite
                                             H/W   Current
Switch#   Role    Mac Address     Priority Version  State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*1       Active   cc98.9114.3580     15     V01     Ready
 2       Member   706b.b9c8.2380     2      V01     Ready
 3       Member   a0f8.4911.c080     3      V01     Ready
 4       Standby  cc98.911a.0800     8      V01     Ready



         Stack Port Status             Neighbors
Switch#  Port 1     Port 2           Port 1   Port 2
--------------------------------------------------------
  1         OK         OK               2        4
  2         OK         OK               3        1
  3         OK         OK               4        2
  4         OK         OK               1        3

examples.name: Single switch with Master role and ports down
examples.input:
Switch/Stack Mac Address : a0e0.af1d.bb80
                                           H/W   Current
Switch#  Role   Mac Address     Priority Version  State
----------------------------------------------------------
*1       Master a0e0.af1d.bb80     1      3       Ready



         Stack Port Status             Neighbors
Switch#  Port 1     Port 2           Port 1   Port 2
--------------------------------------------------------
  1       Down       Down             None     None

examples.name: Stack with an unprovisioned member missing hardware version
examples.input:
Switch/Stack Mac Address : 6c71.abcd.a200  - Local Mac Address
Mac persistency wait time: Indefinite
                                             H/W   Current
Switch#   Role    Mac Address     Priority Version  State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*1       Active   6c71.abcd.a200     1      V03     Ready
 2       Member   0000.0000.0000     0              Unprovisioned



         Stack Port Status             Neighbors
Switch#  Port 1     Port 2           Port 1   Port 2
--------------------------------------------------------
  1       DOWN       DOWN             None     None
